reportPurpose: Consumer imputation-quality report using selected derived panel/build/QC and imputation-quality metrics while explicitly marking benchmark, ancestry-applicability, raw-file, and clinical interpretation context unavailable.
missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable reference panel details, tool versions, allele-frequency checks, benchmark truth-set comparison, ancestry applicability, dosage calibration, and clinical meaning explicitly; do not infer variant truth, disease risk, or medical action.
consumerTone: plain English; educational imputation quality-control context only; no diagnosis, variant truth assertion, clinical sensitivity, disease risk, ancestry certainty, medication, screening, reproductive, lifestyle, or treatment guidance

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived imputation QC metrics for imputation-analysis validation

genomeEvidence.observedValue: derived summary reports GRCh38 target coordinates; TOPMed-like reference-panel context supplied; liftOver not required by upstream summary; imputation server, panel release, and tool build exact versions not supplied

derived autosomal summary: 640,000 typed input markers passed upstream checks; 10,850,000 imputed variant records retained at r2 or rsq >= 0.30; 7,420,000 retained at r2 or rsq >= 0.80; 380,000 records below the configured threshold were excluded
derived dosage summary reports dosages available for retained imputed records; per-variant posterior probabilities, hard-call concordance, and per-region dosage calibration were not supplied

benchmark truth-set comparison, sample ancestry calibration, allele-frequency QC report, phasing engine version, Minimac4 version, reference panel release checksum, per-chromosome failure table, and authenticated sample-report rows are unavailable in this fixture
